message:
feat(embed): integrate frankensearch-embed for hash-based embedding reuse

Switch hash_embedder module to use frankensearch-embed as a shared
dependency rather than maintaining a standalone implementation. This
deduplicates the SimHash/MinHash embedding logic across cass and
frankensearch, ensuring both tools produce identical fingerprints for
the same input and reducing maintenance surface.

- Add frankensearch-embed local path dependency in Cargo.toml
- Update hash_embedder.rs to delegate to shared embedding traits
- Regenerate Cargo.lock with new dependency tree (395 line delta
  reflects transitive deps from frankensearch workspace crates)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
